warehouseQuery.query: SELECT  MPRS.BUSN_AREA_NAME, MPRS.CMPY_CODE, MPRS.RSK_NUM, MPRS.RSK_ID, MPRS.POL_NUM, MPRS.PRD_CODE FROM MODEL.DIM_POLICY_RISK_SK MPRS LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT MODEL_ID FROM SDM.DIM_GI_TRANSLATION WHERE TRANS_TYPE = 'RISK_ID') ST ON MPRS.RSK_ID = ST.MODEL_ID WHERE ST.MODEL_ID IS NULL AND MPRS.PRD_CODE = 'GWC'

expression.expression: (((((in1.RSK_NUM = in0.RISK_NUM_ebiadm) AND (in1.BUSN_AREA_NAME = in0.BUSN_AREA_NAME_ebiadm)) AND (in1.CMPY_CODE = in0.CMPY_NUM_ebiadm)) AND (in1.PRD_CODE = in0.PRD_CODE_ebiadm)) AND (in1.POL_NUM = in0.POL_NUM_ebiadm))

warehouseQuery.query: SELECT DIM_CLAIM_SK.BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_CLAIM_SK.CMPY_NUM, DIM_CLAIM_SK.CLAIM_NUM, DIM_CLAIM_SK.CLAIM_ID FROM MODEL.DIM_CLAIM_SK DIM_CLAIM_SK LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT MODEL_ID FROM SDM.DIM_GI_TRANSLATION WHERE TRANS_TYPE = 'CLAIM_ID') DIM_GI_TRANSLATION ON DIM_CLAIM_SK.CLAIM_ID = DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.MODEL_ID WHERE DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.MODEL_ID IS NULL ORDER BY CLAIM_NUM, CMPY_NUM, BUSN_AREA_NAME

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (RSK_NUM = -1) THEN ABS(RSK_NUM) WHEN (RSK_NUM = 0) THEN 1 ELSE RSK_NUM END)

warehouseQuery.query: SELECT  EPRS.RISK_ID, EPRS.RISK_NUM, EPRS.BUSN_AREA_NAME, EPRS.CMPY_NUM, EPRS.POL_NUM, EPRS.PRD_CODE FROM EBIADM.DIM_GI_POLICY_RISK_SK EPRS LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EBIADM_ID FROM SDM.DIM_GI_TRANSLATION WHERE TRANS_TYPE = 'RISK_ID') ST ON EPRS.RISK_ID = ST.EBIADM_ID WHERE ST.EBIADM_ID IS NULL and EPRS.PRD_CODE = 'GWC'

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((BUSN_AREA_NAME IN ('AMIA_NZ', 'NZA')) = TRUE) THEN '5' WHEN (BUSN_AREA_NAME = 'AMIA') THEN '2' WHEN (BUSN_AREA_NAME = 'GI') THEN CMPY_NUM ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN CAST((BUSN_AREA_NAME IN ('AMIA_NZ', 'NZA')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN '5' WHEN (BUSN_AREA_NAME = 'AMIA') THEN '2' WHEN (BUSN_AREA_NAME = 'GI') THEN CMPY_NUM ELSE NULL END)
((((in0.POL_NUM1 = in1.POL_NUM) AND (in0.BUSN_AREA_NAME1 = in1.BUSN_AREA_NAME)) AND (in0.PRD_CODE1 = in1.PRD_CODE)) AND (in0.CMPY_NUM1 = in1.CMPY_NUM))

warehouseQuery.query: SELECT DIM_POLICY_SK.POL_ID, DIM_POLICY_SK.POL_NUM, DIM_POLICY_SK.BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_POLICY_SK.PRD_CODE, DIM_POLICY_SK.CMPY_NUM FROM MODEL.DIM_POLICY_SK DIM_POLICY_SK LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT MODEL_ID FROM SDM.DIM_GI_TRANSLATION WHERE TRANS_TYPE = 'POL_ID') DIM_GI_TRANSLATION ON DIM_POLICY_SK.POL_ID = DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.MODEL_ID WHERE DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.MODEL_ID IS NULL ORDER BY POL_NUM, BUSN_AREA_NAME, PRD_CODE, CMPY_NUM

SELECT DIM_GI_CLAIM_SK.CLAIM_ID, DIM_GI_CLAIM_SK.BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_CLAIM_SK.CMPY_NUM, DIM_GI_CLAIM_SK.CLAIM_NUM  FROM  EBIADM.DIM_GI_CLAIM_SK DIM_GI_CLAIM_SK  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EBIADM_ID FROM SDM.DIM_GI_TRANSLATION WHERE TRANS_TYPE='CLAIM_ID') DIM_GI_TRANSLATION ON DIM_GI_CLAIM_SK.CLAIM_ID=DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.EBIADM_ID  WHERE  DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.EBIADM_ID IS NULL

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((BUSN_AREA_NAME IN ('AMIA_NZ', 'NZA')) = TRUE) THEN '5' WHEN (BUSN_AREA_NAME = 'AMIA') THEN '2' WHEN (BUSN_AREA_NAME = 'GI') THEN CMPY_NUM ELSE NULL END)

warehouseQuery.query: SELECT DIM_GI_POLICY_SK.POL_ID, DIM_GI_POLICY_SK.BUSN_AREA_NAME, DIM_GI_POLICY_SK.CMPY_NUM, DIM_GI_POLICY_SK.POL_NUM, DIM_GI_POLICY_SK.PRD_CODE  FROM  EBIADM.DIM_GI_POLICY_SK DIM_GI_POLICY_SK  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EBIADM_ID FROM SDM.DIM_GI_TRANSLATION WHERE TRANS_TYPE='POL_ID') DIM_GI_TRANSLATION ON DIM_GI_POLICY_SK.POL_ID=DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.EBIADM_ID  WHERE  DIM_GI_TRANSLATION.EBIADM_ID IS NULL
